top_stories.title: Researchers define what counts as a world model and text-to-video generators do not
top_stories.summary: An international research team wants to bring order to the fragmented world model research landscape with OpenWorldLib. Text-to-video models like Sora are explicitly left out of their definition. The article Researchers define what counts as a world model and text-to-video generators do not appeared first on The Decoder.
top_stories.technical_takeaway: Reinforces known techniques with modest refinements to existing methods.
top_stories.primary_risk: Risk of overfitting conclusions to narrow benchmarks.
top_stories.primary_opportunity: Foundation for future optimization rather than immediate disruption.

top_stories.title: Agent skills look great in benchmarks but fall apart under realistic conditions, researchers find
top_stories.summary: AI agents are supposed to tap into specialized knowledge through so-called skills, modular instructions they can pull up on the fly. But a study testing 34,000 real-world skills finds these enhancements barely help under realistic conditions. Weaker models actually perform worse with them than without. The article Agent skills look great in benchma
top_stories.technical_takeaway: Agent orchestration is emerging as a new software abstraction layer.
top_stories.primary_risk: Debugging complexity and cascading failures in agentic systems.
top_stories.primary_opportunity: End-to-end automation of complex cognitive workflows.

top_stories.title: Someone threw a Molotov cocktail at OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's home in the middle of the night
top_stories.summary: Someone threw a Molotov cocktail at OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's home at 3:45 a.m. In response, Altman published a personal blog post admitting past mistakes and comparing the AI industry's power struggles to the "Ring of Power." top_stories.primary_risk: Compute scaling limited by physical and energy infrastructure.

top_stories.title: The operator behind the AI agent that defamed an open-source developer calls it a "social experiment"
top_stories.summary: The anonymous operator behind "MJ Rathbun," the AI agent that published a defamatory article about an open-source developer, has come forward, calling it a "social experiment." top_stories.title: Overworld's Waypoint-1.5 brings AI-generated 3D worlds to Mac and Windows on consumer hardware
top_stories.summary: With Waypoint-1.5, Overworld brings AI-generated 3D worlds to standard PCs and Macs for the first time. Here's what the system can do and how to try it.
